funders.name: DST-SPLICE
funders.fullName: Strategic Programmes, Large Initiatives & Coordinated Action Enabler — Department of Science & Technology
funders.role: Heads the DST Climate Change Programme (NMSKCC, NMSHE); focus areas include floods, droughts, urban climate and extreme weather.

funders.name: AI CoE for Sustainable Cities
funders.fullName: Centre of Excellence in Artificial Intelligence for Sustainable Cities
funders.role: An IIT Kanpur-led consortium (awarded by the Ministry of Education, 2024) on forecasting and modelling for urban sustainability — including water.

funders.name: Ministry of Education
funders.fullName: Ministry of Education, Government of India
funders.role: Funding ministry for the national AI Centres of Excellence, including Sustainable Cities.

funders.name: Ministry of Science & Technology
funders.fullName: Ministry of Science & Technology, Government of India
funders.role: Parent ministry of the Department of Science & Technology (DST), which hosts SPLICE and the Climate Change Programme.

partnerNote: Organisation identities and roles are verified from public sources. Specific funding linkages should be confirmed with the RAFT team before formal publication.

hostNote.text: RAFT is hosted at the Department of Civil Engineering, IIT Hyderabad.
